title: Page Descriptor
description: A page is a composition of widgets organized in rows. Lives at workspace/pages/<name>.json. The plugin renders it as the page body, wrapped by lifecycle-aware chrome.

name.description: Page identifier. Must match the filename (without .json).

rows.description: Ordered rows. Each row contains one or more widgets rendered side-by-side.

store.description: Path to the store this widget renders, e.g. 'stores/tasks'. Optional for 'diff' (uses left/right config instead).

title.description: Optional display title for this widget instance.

width.description: Optional width fraction within the row. Defaults to equal split.

config.description: Widget-specific configuration. Shape varies by widget type. See per-widget config schemas (TODO).

custom_html_path.description: Path to custom HTML if widget == 'custom'.
